name: unrecognised-kind-discovery-by-name
description: YB-10 rehome (plan task 3.1) of Detector.Tests.ps1's 'an unrecognised vocabulary value is reported BY NAME as a discovery' case (S3.2): a kind absent from vocab.kinds must surface as a named discovery, never a validation failure and never a silent drop. The subject carries neither a dispatch kind nor 'intent', so it contributes to discoveries only, with no dispatches/intents entry. Provenance: OBSERVED - expected block generated by running scripts/Detect-Dispatches.ps1 at repo commit 896e10e on this exact input (2026-07-23), then reviewed for correctness against the pre-existing imperative assertion this vector replaces.
